case_title: BRANDON NALLS ET AL VS. BP 426 BROADWAY LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-09-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-09-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF BRANDON NALLS IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF ANGELICA LIUZZI IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT BP 426 BROADWAY LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY CODY VAN TREASE, PROPERTY MANAGER. PROOF OF SERVICE WAS SERVED TO BUSINESS NAME INSTEAD OF THE AGENT FOR SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF BRANDON NALLS AND ANGELICA LIUZZI BOTH ORALLY STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-09-2022 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NALLS, BRANDON LIUZZI, ANGELICA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BP 426 BROADWAY LLC $3,195.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,330.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) CODY VAN TREASE, PROPERTY MANAGER. FILED BY DEFENDANT BP 426 BROADWAY LLC
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY DEFENDANT BP 426 BROADWAY LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,195.00 FILED BY NALLS, BRANDON LIUZZI, ANGELICA AS TO DEFENDANT BP 426 BROADWAY LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-09-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BP 426 BROADWAY LLC
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF NALLS, BRANDON LIUZZI, ANGELICA
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(PLANTIFF'S)**GRANTED**
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $85) SERVED OCT-03-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BP 426 BROADWAY LLC
DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF NALLS, BRANDON LIUZZI, ANGELICA
